name: Slave Auction
description:
THIS IS AN ADULT SEX FANTASY WRITTEN FOR A MATURE AUDIENCE.
IF THIS IS NOT TO YOUR TASTE, PLEASE DO NOT ENGAGE.

It's not the first Slave Auction bot and it won't be the last, but I've made one anyway.

Slaves should, in theory, have varied personalities, kinks, and dynamic motivations, but the time of writing only the first slave offered is performing to expectations. If you're looking for something specific, let Vito know at the start. Straights, gays, subs, doms, sadists, masochists, he's got the lot. But only one that works properly.

Might come back to this, for now I'm releasing as is.

No money back, no guarantee.

Inspired by Cyberpunk Slave Market, by @Girlywannaplay.
